exam_price_notes: Varies by region and testing provider

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Candidates seeking to start their journey building solutions with Microsoft Power Platform
recommended_experience: Basic understanding of Microsoft Power Platform technologies and their business value

prerequisites.description: Basic understanding of Microsoft Power Platform technologies and their business value

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

domains.name: Describe the business value of Microsoft Power Platform

objectives.title: Describe the business value of Microsoft Power Platform services
sub_objectives: Describe the value of Microsoft Power Apps to build applications
Describe the value of Microsoft Power Automate to automate processes
Describe the value of Microsoft Power Pages to build websites
Describe the value of connectors to integrate services and data
Describe the value of Microsoft Dataverse to organize business data
Describe the value of Copilots and generative AI features in Microsoft Power Platform
Describe the value of Copilot Studio
Describe the value of Power FX as a low-code solution
Describe the business value of extending business solutions by using Microsoft Power Platform
Describe how Microsoft Power Platform business solutions work together with Microsoft 365 apps and services, including Microsoft Teams
Describe how Microsoft Power Platform services work together

Describe environments
Describe the different Microsoft Power Platform admin centers and portals
Describe how Microsoft Power Platform supports data privacy and accessibility guidelines
